# Create Work Items

Create work items in $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/docs/prd-csharp-basic-calculator-solution.md for the .NET 8 console calculator application project: `create-dotnet-calculator` based on the specifications outlined sections 1.6.1 and 1.6.2.

If necessary, use the Azure DevOps MCP server and tools, az devops or direct REST API calls where the organization url is `https://dev.azure.com/autocloudarc-mcaps` and the project name is `create-dotnet-calculator`.
